chunks.title: Lament for the Land
chunks.reason: A continuous prophetic lament expressing grief over the nation's sin and impending judgment.

chunks.title: Question and Answer on Judgment
chunks.reason: A rhetorical question regarding the cause of ruin followed by Yahweh's direct explanation.

chunks.title: Call to Mourning Women
chunks.reason: An instruction to summon professional mourners to lament the destruction of Jerusalem.

chunks.title: True Boasting in God
chunks.reason: A distinct oracle contrasting worldly pride with the knowledge of Yahweh's character.

chunks.title: Judgment on Uncircumcised Nations
chunks.reason: A concluding oracle declaring judgment on both Israel and surrounding nations for spiritual unfaithfulness.
